---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new for K-OS III
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want

A clear description of the feature.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Whose problem? What does the user gain?

## Where it fits

Which app or layer? (Datamoshpit, sprite editor, OS shell, K-Wallet, chat, education, etc.) Link to the relevant design doc in `docs/` if there is one.

## How you imagine it working

Even a rough sketch. UI mockups (pixel art welcome) or a short user story.

## Does this fit The Rules?

The Rules: no rounded corners, no anti-aliasing, no gradient buttons, pixel-correct, monochromatic text. If your feature implies new UI elements, briefly note whether they fit existing templates or whether you'd be proposing a new template (which requires explicit design discussion — see `koolskull-os-ui-notes.md`).

## Alternatives you've considered

Other ways this could work, and why this is the one you're proposing.

## Anything else

Related issues, prior art in other software, links.
